title: matelea gracilis
intro: Matelea gracilis, also known as the slender matelea or slender swallowwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Matelea gracilis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Matelea gracilis often involve its leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
